name: World Streaming Cell
description: Chunk-based world streaming with trigger zones, async scene loading/unloading, and LOD management. Keeps a configurable radius of cells loaded around the player and unloads distant chunks. Uses non-blocking _process polling for threaded loads.

slots.name: parent
slots.description: Parent node path for the WorldStreamer

slots.name: cell_size
slots.description: Side length of each streaming cell in meters

slots.name: load_radius
slots.description: Number of cells to keep loaded in each direction

slots.name: unload_margin
slots.description: Extra radius multiplier before unloading (avoids thrashing)

slots.name: stream_path
slots.description: Directory containing cell scene files (named cell_<x>_<z>.tscn)
